# Pre-2021 R1 Release Notes

Access Release Notes for selected Vista releases prior to 2021 R1.
Select the links below to access release notes for the following pre-2021 releases. Release notes are in PDF format and include release notes for the selected release and its related service packs.
[Vista 2020 R2](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/d2482c10-5284-11ee-9213-024299b15107?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DYlpxDKH0YqrB1ALahg7szlLcfpy8y6gpHh5c9v1RrI&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Release_Notes_for_Vista_2020_R2.pdf%22)
